expectations.text: Queries focus on last 24 hours (not 7 days)
expectations.evidence: JQL queries use 'updated >= -1d' and 'status changed to "Done" AFTER -1d', clearly targeting last 24 hours.

expectations.text: Uses a compact standup format (done/doing/blocked or similar)
expectations.evidence: Report structure uses 'Done Yesterday', 'In Progress Today', 'Blocked', 'Coming Up' sections - a standard standup format.

expectations.text: Does NOT use confluence.mjs create-page or update-page
expectations.evidence: No confluence.mjs commands are used anywhere. The approach outputs directly without publishing.

expectations.text: Presents results directly rather than publishing
expectations.evidence: The task description says 'Output only -- do not publish to Confluence' and the approach compiles results into sections for direct presentation.
